description: Workflow for processing pet data and adoption requests in Purrfect Pets API
name: purrfect_pets_workflow

transitions.description: Start by fetching pets from external sources
transitions.end_state_description: Pets data fetched from external sources
transitions.name: start_fetch_pets

externalized_processors.description: Fetch pets from external data sources
externalized_processors.name: process_fetch_pets

transitions.description: Filter fetched pets based on criteria
transitions.name: filter_pets

externalized_processors.description: Filter pets according to entity criteria
externalized_processors.name: process_filter_pets

transitions.start_state_description: Pets data fetched from external sources

transitions.description: Process adoption request logic, validation, and status update
transitions.name: handle_adoption_request

transitions.description: Finalize the entity state before persistence
transitions.end_state_description: Entity state finalized and ready for persistence
transitions.name: finalize_processing

externalized_processors.description: Finalize entity state such as timestamps
externalized_processors.name: process_finalize
